# ADR-CXP-001: REST/JSON as API Style for All Layers

**Status:** Accepted
**Date:** 2026-06-17
**Functionality:** CXP-GHCopilot-Sonnet46 – Cuentas por Pagar
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

---

## Context

The CXP system exposes invoice and payment operations to a React SPA across three roles (ANALYST, MANAGER, TREASURER), and integrates with external systems (ERP and Banking). An API style must be selected for all layers.

## Decision

Adopt **REST/JSON** with URI versioning `/v1/` across all API layers (Experience, Business, Domain, Support).

## Rationale

- Aligned with DDA-002 from the project context
- Native compatibility with React Query / Axios
- HTTP cache semantics for GET operations
- Per-route RBAC enforcement is simpler than per-field (GraphQL)
- Broad interoperability with ERP and Banking System partners
- RFC 7807 Problem Details for standardised error responses

## Alternatives Considered

| Alternative | Reason Rejected |
|---|---|
| GraphQL | Per-field RBAC adds complexity; no multi-source federation needed |
| gRPC | Not browser-compatible without an additional proxy layer |
| AsyncAPI (events-first) | Synchronous request/response pattern sufficient for all 3 use cases |

## Consequences

- **Positive:** Interoperability, simplicity, widely adopted standard
- **Positive:** Tooling ecosystem (OpenAPI generators, Swagger UI, Postman)
- **Negative:** Possible multiple round-trips for composite views (mitigated by BFF pattern)
- **Negative:** Breaking changes require a new `/v2/` version; governance required
